properties.name: management.endpoint.flyway.access
properties.description: Permitted level of access for the flyway endpoint.

properties.name: management.endpoint.flyway.cache.time-to-live
properties.description: Maximum time that a response can be cached.

properties.name: spring.flyway.baseline-description
properties.description: Description to tag an existing schema with when applying a baseline.

properties.name: spring.flyway.baseline-on-migrate
properties.description: Whether to automatically call baseline when migrating a non-empty schema.

properties.name: spring.flyway.baseline-version
properties.description: Version to tag an existing schema with when executing baseline.

properties.name: spring.flyway.batch
properties.description: Whether to batch SQL statements when executing them.

properties.name: spring.flyway.callback-locations
properties.description: Locations of callbacks. Can contain the special "{vendor}" placeholder to use vendor-specific callbacks. Unprefixed locations or locations starting with "classpath:" point to a package on the classpath and may contain both SQL and Java-based callbacks. Locations starting with "filesystem:" point to a directory on the filesystem, may only contain SQL callbacks.

properties.name: spring.flyway.clean-disabled
properties.description: Whether to disable cleaning of the database.

properties.name: spring.flyway.community-db-support-enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable community database support.

properties.name: spring.flyway.connect-retries
properties.description: Maximum number of retries when attempting to connect to the database.

properties.name: spring.flyway.connect-retries-interval
properties.description: Maximum time between retries when attempting to connect to the database. If a duration suffix is not specified, seconds will be used.

properties.name: spring.flyway.create-schemas
properties.description: Whether Flyway should attempt to create the schemas specified in the schemas property.

properties.name: spring.flyway.default-schema
properties.description: Default schema name managed by Flyway (case-sensitive).

properties.name: spring.flyway.detect-encoding
properties.description: Whether to attempt to automatically detect SQL migration file encoding.

properties.name: spring.flyway.driver-class-name
properties.description: Fully qualified name of the JDBC driver. Auto-detected based on the URL by default.

properties.name: spring.flyway.dry-run-output
properties.description: File to which the SQL statements of a migration dry run should be output. Requires Flyway Teams.

properties.name: spring.flyway.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable flyway.

properties.name: spring.flyway.encoding
properties.description: Encoding of SQL migrations.

properties.name: spring.flyway.error-overrides
properties.description: Rules for the built-in error handling to override specific SQL states and error codes. Requires Flyway Teams.

properties.name: spring.flyway.execute-in-transaction
properties.description: Whether Flyway should execute SQL within a transaction.

properties.name: spring.flyway.fail-on-missing-locations
properties.description: Whether to fail if a location of migration scripts doesn't exist.

properties.name: spring.flyway.group
properties.description: Whether to group all pending migrations together in the same transaction when applying them.

properties.name: spring.flyway.ignore-migration-patterns
properties.description: List of patterns that identify migrations to ignore when performing validation.

properties.name: spring.flyway.init-sqls
properties.description: SQL statements to execute to initialize a connection immediately after obtaining it.

properties.name: spring.flyway.installed-by
properties.description: Username recorded in the schema history table as having applied the migration.

properties.name: spring.flyway.jdbc-properties
properties.description: Properties to pass to the JDBC driver.

properties.name: spring.flyway.kerberos-config-file
properties.description: Path of the Kerberos config file. Requires Flyway Teams.

properties.name: spring.flyway.locations
properties.description: Locations of migrations scripts. Can contain the special "{vendor}" placeholder to use vendor-specific locations.

properties.name: spring.flyway.lock-retry-count
properties.description: Maximum number of retries when trying to obtain a lock.

properties.name: spring.flyway.loggers
properties.description: Loggers Flyway should use.

properties.name: spring.flyway.mixed
properties.description: Whether to allow mixing transactional and non-transactional statements within the same migration.

properties.name: spring.flyway.oracle.kerberos-cache-file
properties.description: Path of the Oracle Kerberos cache file. Requires Flyway Teams.

properties.name: spring.flyway.oracle.sqlplus
properties.description: Whether to enable support for Oracle SQL*Plus commands. Requires Flyway Teams.

properties.name: spring.flyway.oracle.sqlplus-warn
properties.description: Whether to issue a warning rather than an error when a not-yet-supported Oracle SQL*Plus statement is encountered. Requires Flyway Teams.

properties.name: spring.flyway.oracle.wallet-location
properties.description: Location of the Oracle Wallet, used to sign in to the database automatically. Requires Flyway Teams.

properties.name: spring.flyway.out-of-order
properties.description: Whether to allow migrations to be run out of order.

properties.name: spring.flyway.output-query-results
properties.description: Whether Flyway should output a table with the results of queries when executing migrations.

properties.name: spring.flyway.password
properties.description: Login password of the database to migrate.

properties.name: spring.flyway.placeholder-prefix
properties.description: Prefix of placeholders in migration scripts.

properties.name: spring.flyway.placeholder-replacement
properties.description: Perform placeholder replacement in migration scripts.

properties.name: spring.flyway.placeholder-separator
properties.description: Separator of default placeholders.

properties.name: spring.flyway.placeholder-suffix
properties.description: Suffix of placeholders in migration scripts.

properties.name: spring.flyway.placeholders
properties.description: Placeholders and their replacements to apply to sql migration scripts.

properties.name: spring.flyway.postgresql.transactional-lock
properties.description: Whether transactional advisory locks should be used. If set to false, session-level locks are used instead.

properties.name: spring.flyway.powershell-executable
properties.description: PowerShell executable to use for running PowerShell scripts. Default to "powershell" on Windows, "pwsh" on other platforms.

properties.name: spring.flyway.repeatable-sql-migration-prefix
properties.description: File name prefix for repeatable SQL migrations.

properties.name: spring.flyway.schemas
properties.description: Scheme names managed by Flyway (case-sensitive).

properties.name: spring.flyway.script-placeholder-prefix
properties.description: Prefix of placeholders in migration scripts.

properties.name: spring.flyway.script-placeholder-suffix
properties.description: Suffix of placeholders in migration scripts.

properties.name: spring.flyway.skip-default-callbacks
properties.description: Whether to skip default callbacks. If true, only custom callbacks are used.

properties.name: spring.flyway.skip-default-resolvers
properties.description: Whether to skip default resolvers. If true, only custom resolvers are used.

properties.name: spring.flyway.skip-executing-migrations
properties.description: Whether Flyway should skip executing the contents of the migrations and only update the schema history table.

properties.name: spring.flyway.sql-migration-prefix
properties.description: File name prefix for SQL migrations.

properties.name: spring.flyway.sql-migration-separator
properties.description: File name separator for SQL migrations.

properties.name: spring.flyway.sql-migration-suffixes
properties.description: File name suffix for SQL migrations.

properties.name: spring.flyway.sqlserver.kerberos-login-file
properties.description: Path to the SQL Server Kerberos login file. Requires Flyway Teams.

properties.name: spring.flyway.stream
properties.description: Whether to stream SQL migrations when executing them.

properties.name: spring.flyway.table
properties.description: Name of the schema history table that will be used by Flyway.

properties.name: spring.flyway.tablespace
properties.description: Tablespace in which the schema history table is created. Ignored when using a database that does not support tablespaces. Defaults to the default tablespace of the connection used by Flyway.

properties.name: spring.flyway.target
properties.description: Target version up to which migrations should be considered.

properties.name: spring.flyway.url
properties.description: JDBC url of the database to migrate. If not set, the primary configured data source is used.

properties.name: spring.flyway.user
properties.description: Login user of the database to migrate.

properties.name: spring.flyway.validate-migration-naming
properties.description: Whether to validate migrations and callbacks whose scripts do not obey the correct naming convention.

properties.name: spring.flyway.validate-on-migrate
properties.description: Whether to automatically call validate when performing a migration.
